title: Dimensions
description: The 8 assessment dimensions. Each has a unique ID, display name, icon, weight, and description.

id.description: Unique snake_case identifier used as a key throughout the application.

name.description: Full dimension name, used in schema documentation and alt text.

label.description: Full display label shown in the UI.

shortLabel.description: Short label used in compact UI contexts (radar chart axis labels, mobile).

icon.description: Lucide icon name (kebab-case). See https://lucide.dev/icons/ for valid names.

weight.description: Relative weight applied when computing the overall score. Default is 1.0.

description.description: Two-sentence description of what this dimension covers and why it matters.

color.description: Hex colour used for this dimension in charts and UI accents.
